source_textbook.name: Khan Academy Mathematics 3rd-5th Grade
source_textbook.section: Fractions, Decimals, Measurement, Geometry, Place Value

extracted_concepts.name: multiplication concept
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Understanding multiplication as equal groups or repeated addition

extracted_concepts.name: division concept
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Understanding division as sharing or grouping equally

extracted_concepts.name: factor pairs
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Two numbers that multiply to give a product

extracted_concepts.name: multiples
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Products of a given number (e.g., multiples of 5: 5, 10, 15, ...)

extracted_concepts.name: rounding
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Approximating a number to the nearest place value

extracted_concepts.name: expanded form
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Writing a number as sum of place values: 345 = 300 + 40 + 5

extracted_concepts.name: mixed number
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: A whole number plus a fraction: 2 1/3

extracted_concepts.name: improper fraction
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: A fraction where numerator ≥ denominator: 7/3

extracted_concepts.name: compare fractions
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Determining which fraction is larger using common denominators or numerators

extracted_concepts.name: add fractions
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Adding fractions with like or unlike denominators

extracted_concepts.name: subtract fractions
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Subtracting fractions with like or unlike denominators

extracted_concepts.name: multiply fraction by whole
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Multiplying a fraction by a whole number

extracted_concepts.name: area model
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Using rectangles to represent multiplication or fraction operations

extracted_concepts.name: number line
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: A line representing all real numbers with equal spacing

extracted_concepts.name: coordinate grid
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: A grid with x and y axes for locating points

extracted_concepts.name: bar graph
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: A graph using bars to represent data

extracted_concepts.name: line plot
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: A graph showing frequency of data on a number line

extracted_concepts.name: volume
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Amount of space inside a 3D figure (length × width × height)

extracted_concepts.name: surface area
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Total area of all faces of a 3D figure

extracted_concepts.name: unit rate
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: A rate with denominator of 1 (e.g., miles per hour)

extracted_relations.evidence: Division is the inverse of multiplication
Factor pairs are two numbers that multiply to give a product
Multiples are products of repeated multiplication
Rounding uses place value to approximate
Expanded form shows the value of each digit
Mixed numbers combine whole numbers and fractions
Comparing fractions determines which is larger
Adding fractions combines parts of a whole
Multiplying fraction by whole extends multiplication
Area model visualizes multiplication as rectangles
Coordinate grid is two number lines perpendicular
Volume extends area to three dimensions
Surface area is total area of 3D figure faces
Unit rate is a ratio with denominator 1
